Title: User Selects State, Region, and City
Preconditions: User is on the initial screen.
Test Steps:
1. User selects state, region, and city.
2. System proceeds to the next screen.
Expected Result: User is taken to the next screen where they select their current position.

Title: User Selects Current Position
Preconditions: User has selected state, region, and city.
Test Steps:
1. User selects their current position.
2. System makes a server request.
Expected Result: Server request is made successfully.

Title: Server Returns Data
Preconditions: Server request is made.
Test Steps:
1. Server returns data.
2. System presents the data to the user.
Expected Result: User sees the presented data.

Title: Scroll Down to Update Data
Preconditions: User is viewing the initial map.
Test Steps:
1. User scrolls down on the map.
2. System updates the map data.
Expected Result: Updated map data is displayed.

Title: User Receives Suggestions
Preconditions: User is viewing the initial map.
Test Steps:
1. User presses the suggestion button.
2. System displays the suggestion screen.
Expected Result: Suggestion screen is displayed.

Title: Application Launch
Preconditions: Application is installed.
Test Steps:
1. User launches the application.
2. Application loads countries.
3. Application recovers states.
4. Application recovers regions.
5. Application recovers cities.
6. Application gets HTTP data.
7. Application handles the message.
8. Application navigates to the main activity.
9. Application gets HTTP data again.
Expected Result: Application successfully loads and navigates through the required data.

Title: Permission Check and Location Retrieval
Preconditions: Application is launched.
Test Steps:
1. Application checks self permission.
2. Application requests fine location permission if necessary.
3. Application retrieves location.
Expected Result: Application successfully retrieves location after checking permissions.

Title: Enable and Update Widget
Preconditions: Widget is enabled.
Test Steps:
1. User enables the widget.
2. Widget provider updates the app widget.
3. AirVisual API retrieves data.
4. User is presented with the data.
Expected Result: Widget is updated with the latest data from the AirVisual API.

Title: User Interacts with Map Activity
Preconditions: User is using the map activity.
Test Steps:
1. User interacts with the map activity.
2. Map activity uses the AirVisual API.
Expected Result: User sees real-time or near-real-time data from the AirVisual API.

Title: User Decides Nation, Region, and City
Preconditions: User is deciding the nation, region, and city of interest.
Test Steps:
1. User decides the nation, region, and city of interest.
2. Position determines frequently asked questions index (FAQI) of the city.
3. Activity tips reform the data.
Expected Result: User receives reformed data based on their decision.
